venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.excerpt: Release your grief and conquer cancer through pulsating discos and wild workouts in an endless round of partying. That’s the message of Sarah Asante Gregory and performer/co-writer Bex Wall in Life Would Be Pretty Dull Without Sex, Raves and MDMA at theSpace at Surgeons Hall.If that sounds wild and outrageous, it’s because it is.
